title: DEWALT DCLE34035B-XJ 18V MAX 3x360 Remote Control Laser, Bare Tool
description: 18V MAX 3x360 Remote Control Laser, Bare Tool.
features: HIGH PRECISION AND EFFICIENCY: The DEWALT 18V MAX 3x360 Remote Control Laser offers remote control fine-tuning and high visibility green beams, making it optimal for precise and efficient leveling and alignment tasks
REMOTE CONTROL FINE TUNE UP TO 100M: Increases efficiency and productivity by allowing remote adjustments
HORIZONTAL AND VERTICAL ADJUSTMENTS: Make adjustments up to 90mm and rotate up to 174° for increased precision and productivity
LONG RUNTIME: Provides 9 hours of runtime with two beams on full brightness, running for a full day without downtime with the included 18V XR 2.0Ah battery
MANUAL SLOPE FUNCTION: Allows for applications on staircases, ramps, and other inclined surfaces with a 4-degree manual slope function
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Measuring & Layout Tools > Laser Measuring Devices & Accessories > Laser Levels
